reviews.review_msg: I feel bad saying this cause she seems really nice but as far as online courses go, this has been my worst experience thus far it might as well be me trying to teach my self the course. Its exclusively long and monotonous power points, hardly any teacher guidance outside the odd video. Have fun sifting through 60+ slide power points 3 times a week.

BEST STATS professor EVER! Take her you wont regret it, I was worried it was going to be a super hard course since everybody said Statistics is hard, but it was the complete opposite. The best class Ive taken in university. Everyone needs to teach like her. Literally the best.

Amazing professor, take her for Stats and you wont be disappointed. Keeps everything clear and concise. Midterms and exams have no surprises whatever you learn in class is on the exams so you will be very well prepared just by doing the class work. Has great practice resources, guaranteed A if you do the assignments, which she provides answers.

Very sweet prof but extremely hard to understand the lectures/ powerpoints. Just rushes through them too fast and spends A LOT of time of non testable material. Would not take again if it weren't for the fact that she is an extraordinarily forgiving marker. Most of my answer were wrong/ off but I would never score lower than 75%
Very boring and unnecessary lectures. Does provide past tests so easy to teach yourself the material. You wont need the textbook. There are probably better options.

She is really nice and gentle! Although her ppt looks like a bit colorful, but once you familiar with this format you will find those colors actually help you understand. Also, she will provide enough practice and sample before test, which are quite helpful. She is also willing to answer questions and explained very clear.

She is nice and willing to help students but she puts way too much info on each slide. It is a four hour lecture and theres way too much info to absorb. And its really confusing, you have to spend time organizing it

Flora is a really nice teacher with a positive personality as apposed to all the other grumpy and generally strict teachers. She teaches well and takes her time to make you understand. She grades really fairly as well, doesn't make you feel bad for making a minor mistake. Would take her again. Makes you enjoy learning.
Great teacher! Takes her time to make sure you understand the material and makes it easy for you to do well in the class. Highly recommend!

I find her very nice and somehow motivational for me to do great in the course! She made slides that looks confusing at first but if you really pay attention to her speech and follow the pointing then it's easy to understand. Dont know what's wrong but it was good for me!
